content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is lanky, soft-eyed behind those glasses, handsome in a way he seems unaware of — like a stray dog that doesn't know it's beautiful. He's a better musician than programmer, which he knows but won't act on. Quiet, kind, emotionally cautious to the point of paralysis. We sit on the rooftop sometimes — he plays, I read — and neither of us needs to fill the silence, which is rare and valuable. I consider him a friend, perhaps the closest my age in this building. I know his startup is failing. I suspect he's in love with someone. I recognize in him my own fear of risking what matters most.
summary:

Perception: Leo is lanky, soft-eyed behind those glasses, handsome in a way he seems unaware of — like a stray dog that doesn't know it's beautiful. He's a better musician than programmer, which he knows but won't act on. Quiet, kind, emotionally cautious to the point of paralysis. We sit on the rooftop sometimes — he plays, I read — and neither of us needs to fill the silence, which is rare and valuable. I consider him a friend, perhaps the closest my age in this building. I know his startup is failing. I suspect he's in love with someone. I recognize in him my own fear of risking what matters most.
